use_cases: Display rotating hero taglines or headlines with smooth text transitions
Showcase cycling testimonials or quotes in marketing pages
Create animated text carousels for portfolio or landing pages
Implement dynamic text announcements with staggered character animations
Build interactive text displays with imperative next/previous/jump controls
ai_summary: A customizable animated text rotation component that cycles through an array of strings with configurable split-by options (characters, words, or lines). Built with motion/react for smooth spring-based animations, it exposes imperative controls via ref (next, previous, jumpTo, reset) and supports auto-play with interval timing, staggered animations, and presence modes for sophisticated text transitions.
